datavalue.value: Singapore visits Arsenio Dominguez and Jeffrey Siow (54947700088) - cropped.jpg

wikipedia.title: Jeffrey Siow
wikipedia.extract: Jeffrey Siow Chen Siang is a Singaporean politician and former civil servant who has served as the acting Minister for Transport since 2025. A member of the ruling People's Action Party (PAP), he is the Member of Parliament (MP) representing the Brickland-Tengah ward of Chua Chu Kang Group Representation Constituency (GRC) since 2025.
wikipedia.extract_html: Jeffrey Siow Chen Siang is a Singaporean politician and former civil servant who has served as the acting Minister for Transport since 2025. A member of the ruling People's Action Party (PAP), he is the Member of Parliament (MP) representing the Brickland-Tengah ward of Chua Chu Kang Group Representation Constituency (GRC) since 2025.
